description:
public_key_der() uses picky-asn1-x509::SubjectPublicKeyInfo and picky-asn1-der::to_vec to serialize the SPKI. These are pinned at picky-asn1-der = '0.5' and picky-asn1-x509 = '0.15'.

While these types don't appear in the public API (the return type is Vec<u8>), the exact DER bytes returned by public_key_der() depend on how picky-asn1-der serializes the SPKI. If a picky-asn1 update changes serialization (e.g. field ordering, optional field encoding), the output changes silently. Callers comparing public key fingerprints across crate versions would see different results.

What goes wrong: A semver-compatible bump to picky-asn1-der 0.6 could change the DER encoding of the same TPM public key, breaking callers who hash/fingerprint the output. There are no integration tests that pin the DER output against a reference vector.

Location: lib.rs lines 456-464 (public_key_der impl).

Mitigation: Either (a) add a test that verifies DER output against a known-good reference, or (b) switch to a more widely-used DER encoder (e.g. der crate from RustCrypto) whose serialization stability is better documented.
title: picky-asn1-x509 and picky-asn1-der pin public API output format
